name: Cyber Psychosis
short_description: Cyber Psychosis is a pseudo-3D dynamic first-person shooter in a cyberpunk setting with a lot of enemies, blood and drive
reasons: 最優先ジャンル: First-Person Shooter +50
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Now
short_description: Now is a challenging horror-strategy FPS survival game. Set in a dark world filled with radiation and mystery, you must complete various missions while trying to stay alive against terrifying threats. Do you have the skills and courage to survive in the middle of this darkness? Let's see!

name: Cursed Companions
short_description: If we say the wrong words... WE DIE! This game kills you with your own voices! Online co-op where everyone gets a forbidden word, say it and you kill your friends. Explore spooky dungeons, cast spells and defeat monsters with your voices. 8-player Co-op Mode. 16-player Traitor Mode
reasons: 次点ジャンル: Online Co-op +30
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Chthonian TD
short_description: Fast-paced co-op action roguelite × tower defense. Fight escalating waves, risk resources in a dangerous mine, defeat the boss - then see how long you survive in Endless.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10
現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Our Wonderland
short_description: A horror-fantasy visual novel following the trials of a dysfunctional friend group thrust back into the wish-granting wonderland of their youth. Either they face the issues plaguing them or risk dying in horrific ways again… and again… and again.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Vape Store Miami: Prologue
short_description: Get your first taste of running a retro Miami vape shop in this 1–4 player co-op simulator prologue. Stock shelves, serve customers, craft custom e-liquids, handle phone and online orders, build your reputation, and lay the foundation for a growing business.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Deadlined.
short_description: a Psychological Horror where you lose yourself while trying to finish your paperwork before the Deadline.

name: Wahm
short_description: A psychological Arabic horror short story. You set off toward the Empty Quarter, off-roading deep into the vast desert, a place meant for peace and clarity.

name: Cat Mail Co.
short_description: Run a cozy cat post office. Sort and deliver parcels from the daily boat, organizing everything your way. At night, the moon reveals hidden truths about packages. Clear a strange backlog, help locals, and unlock new abilities and destinations.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Capybara Bingo
short_description: A cozy party bingo game for 1–8 players. Manage up to 6 cards, stamp your numbers, and race to call bingo — but get it wrong and you pay the price. Cozy mayhem with capybaras, abilities, and lots of cosmetics.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: ELEVATOR: AVICI
short_description: "ELEVATOR: AVICI" is a 1st-person psychological horror with a retro, HK lo-fi aesthetic. Trapped in a decaying apartment elevator, your only link to the outside is a strange voice on the intercom claiming to be a repairman. Will you follow his commands, or find your own escape from the darkness?
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Mesmalie
short_description: MESMALIE is an occult visual novel with point and click mechanics. A magickal incident in your personal life brings you to a small witches' coven in the middle of nowhere. Here, you'll learn to tame your ability... though, not without some bumps along the way.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
short_description: The iconic solo pirate adventure returns. Sail the Caribbean as Edward Kenway during the Golden Age of Piracy in this faithfully enhanced remake featuring stunning visuals, upgraded gameplay, and new content.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
short_description: The iconic solo pirate adventure returns. Sail the Caribbean as Edward Kenway during the Golden Age of Piracy in this faithfully enhanced remake featuring stunning visuals, upgraded gameplay, and new content.

name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - Master Assassin Naval Pack

short_description: "Become an infernal pirate with fiery vengeance with the Hellfire Character Pack, featuring: - Hellion Armor (gear set) - Blades of the Damned (swords) - Diabolist's Pistol - Demon-forged Pendant (trinket)"

name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - Sea Serpent Character Pack
short_description: "Get gear inspired by abyssal sea creatures with the Sea Serpent Character Pack, featuring: - Stormfury Shroud (gear set) - Serpent's Fang Cutlass (sword) - Fury of the Deep Pistol - Abyssal Pendant (trinket)"

short_description: Get the Sea Serpent Naval Pack, featuring: - Ocean's Fury Sail Set - Sea Monkey Ship's Pet - Sea Venom Crew Attire - Snakehead Ship's Wheel - Leviathan Figurehead - Kraken's Scale Hull Trim

name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - Dragon Storm Character Pack

name: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced - Map Pack
short_description: "Use a special spyglass to instantly unlock rare collectibles across the World Map. The list of collectibles revealed includes: - Mayan Stelae - Shanties - Treasure Maps - Letters - Special Chests - Animus Keys"

name: Cozy Tide
short_description: A cozy fishing and island-building game where you catch strange fish, expand your tiny island, decorate postcard islands, complete daily voyages, and collect your way through a cheerful ocean world.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: SonderSoft Soccer: Monkeys VS Robots!
short_description: We forced a bunch of monkeys to compete against robots for half a year in 20 virtual soccer fields, and now YOU can enjoy the resulting shenanigans. Machine learning is the future, and the future is Monkeys VS Robots, where you go head to head with Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL!!!)

name: Tattoo Dungeon
short_description: Tattoo Dungeon is an action-adventure style platformer, where you play as a tattoo apprentice who gets thrown into the midst of an invasion of other-dimensional tattoo monsters, all while trying to find your mentor's lost tattoo flash!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: ΠΟΛΙΣ — Athens
short_description: Govern classical Athens across 272 unbroken years (594–322 BC). Steer family factions, the favour of the gods, and shifting alliances through 332 historical events — as the tide of history carries your city, inexorably, toward 322 BC.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Sim: World Cup Manager
short_description: Take charge of your nation from a world of 202 teams and chase international glory. Build your squad, master deep tactics and live sideline shouts, unearth wonderkids in your national youth academy, and battle through the World Cup and Continental Championships in a deep football management sim.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Evil Thing
short_description: Deep in the mountains stands a dying fox shrine. As a new shaman with a spiritual bond to immortals, you're now its guardian. But this temple is no sanctuary—corruption spreads, dark forces watch. Can you survive each night in this cursed land?

name: Prince of Vibe Code
short_description: An incremental game where you become the most successful game developer. Create and play 44 games with just a few clicks, read the chat and follow the story, sell your games, and grow your fanbase. You win when you have $1,000,000,000,000 and 7 billion followers.
